events.title: Rural Health & Sanitation Drive
events.description: Help our medical teams set up mobile testing booths, distribute sanitary packs, and lead health workshops for families.

events.title: Back-to-School Distribution
events.description: Join our logistics crew sorting and distributing educational packages, textbooks, and solar study lamps to off-grid pupils.

events.title: Digital Boot Camp Mentorship
events.description: Looking for computing assistants to mentor youths on foundational software layouts and web design basics.
